name: MBX Biosciences, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of novel precision peptide therapies for the treatment of endocrine and metabolic disorders.
sellsTo: Patients with endocrine and metabolic disorders

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of novel precision peptide therapies for the treatment of endocrine and metabolic disorders.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 3 clinical trial of canvuparatide
catalysts.sentence: initiate a Phase 3 clinical trial of canvuparatide in the third quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Present Phase 2 results and one-year follow-up data for canvuparatide at a medical meeting
catalysts.sentence: We also intend to present results from our Phase 2 clinical trial and report one-year follow-up data from our ongoing open-label extension study at a medical meeting in the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Report topline results from Phase 2a trial of imapextide (STEADI)
catalysts.sentence: Topline results are expected in the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Report results from 12-week MAD portion of Phase 1 trial of MBX 4291
catalysts.sentence: Results from the planned 12-week MAD portion are expected in the fourth quarter of 2026
